repo_prior_art.cite: none in API/close proposals; supporting Pearl-corner calibration only

published_prior_art.cite: Pearl1995CausalDiagrams: front-door functional identifies ACE under the exclusion/front-door conditions

repo_prior_art.cite: CausalSmith API Manski bounds entries use compact endpoint intervals; no leaky-front-door monotone sensitivity scale

published_prior_art.cite: Manski1990NonparametricBounds plus standard compactness/Weierstrass endpoint logic

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator_v1: shared latent coordinates make rectangular mediator bounds nonsharp, but not this single clean-mediator bounded direct-leak ACE set

published_prior_art.cite: Pearl1995CausalDiagrams, FulcherShpitserMarealleTchetgen2017GeneralizedFrontDoor, and DingVanderWeele2016SharpMediationSensitivity do not give this sharp total-effect leak-indexed set

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_proximal_l2_bridge_v1 has closed-form proximal L2 endpoints, not bilinear shared-U front-door vertices or a leak kink

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997Bounds and FinkelsteinAdamsSariaShpitser2020MeasurementError supply LP/discrete-latent templates but not the proposed bilinear shared-U rational endpoint formula

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_proximal_l2_bridge_v1 Open-ended Question 3: pointwise inference for nonsmooth endpoint maps

published_prior_art.cite: FangSantos2019DirectionallyDifferentiable and ChernozhukovHongTamer2007ParameterSets provide the generic inference framework, not this endpoint-specific estimator

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3 / Related work
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal says DingVanderWeele2016SharpMediationSensitivity keeps the direct path excluded, but that paper is explicitly about direct and indirect effects under mediator-outcome confounding rather than excluding direct effects.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: Strictness is conditioned on the latent statement w1 != w0, but I(lambda), B_box(lambda), and B_sens(lambda) are functions of P, so the regime must be stated as an observable property, a model-class restriction, or an all/existential quantifier over feasible completions.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 4
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed rational functions are values at 'vertices' of a bilinear semialgebraic feasible set; the proposal must define the lifted active-set cell or polyhedral object whose vertices are being enumerated.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: §11 clarifies compact monotone endpoints are claimed, but connectedness/full-interval structure of I(lambda) is not proved.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Stage 0 should treat Theorem 2 as an endpoint compactness/monotonicity result, not a proof that I(lambda) equals the full interval [L(lambda),U(lambda)].

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 4
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: §11 flags the finite-vertex and lambda-star active-set structure as open for the bilinear program.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The closed-form endpoint/kink claim is conditional on constructing the active-set enumeration, and tier credit is capped at field until that construction is explicit.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rewrite Conjecture 3 using an observable or model-class condition for confounder shift, and update the no-shift sanity corollary so it is not keyed to an unobserved completion unless the quantifier is explicit.

Correct the Ding-VanderWeele comparison: they bound direct and indirect effects under mediator-outcome confounding; the contrast should be clean-mediator bounded direct leak versus dirty-mediator sensitivity, not 'direct path excluded'.
Define B_box(lambda) and B_sens(lambda) as explicit endpoint programs, not prose relaxations, so the strict-inclusion statement has a checkable mathematical target.

Either give a two-point-support rational active-set exhibit for Conjecture 4 or relabel the threshold formula as an Open-ended Question whose Handle is the active-set enumeration and branch-crossing computation.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this angle; the kernel is plausibly field-novel, but the latent-shift regime and bilinear-vertex object must be made well-posed before Stage 0.
